intended_use: Koios Decision Support (DS) is an artificial intelligence (AI)/machine learning (ML)-based computer-aided diagnosis (CADx) software device intended for use as an adjunct to diagnostic ultrasound exami
intended_use_full: Koios Decision Support (DS) is an artificial intelligence (AI)/machine learning (ML)-based computer-aided diagnosis (CADx) software device intended for use as an adjunct to diagnostic ultrasound examinations of lesions or nodules suspicious for breast or thyroid cancer.
target_condition: Breast lesions and thyroid nodules suspicious for cancer
ground_truth: Pathology or 1-year follow-up imaging for cases not biopsied
other_metrics: Breast: Sensitivity increase of 0.6% compared to predicate device; Specificity increase of 2.2% compared to predicate device; AUC increase of 1.6% compared to predicate device. Thyroid: Performance unchanged from predicate device.
